## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Metadata and GrowthX to discuss content performance, strategy adjustments, and upcoming topics.](https://fathom.video/share/nABCKSnQsoKV7BZXAebMujCT2fdJ83sq?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Organic search performance is improving, with increases in clicks, impressions, and click-through rates](https://fathom.video/share/nABCKSnQsoKV7BZXAebMujCT2fdJ83sq?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)
  - [Content strategy shifting to more in-depth, search intent-focused pieces using a new AI writing process](https://fathom.video/share/nABCKSnQsoKV7BZXAebMujCT2fdJ83sq?tab=summary&timestamp=1162.0)
  - [Focus on high-priority keywords like "Facebook for B2B" and "ABM lead gen software" for upcoming content](https://fathom.video/share/nABCKSnQsoKV7BZXAebMujCT2fdJ83sq?tab=summary&timestamp=1402.0)
  - [Process adjustment: approve content topics before moving to production to streamline workflow](https://fathom.video/share/nABCKSnQsoKV7BZXAebMujCT2fdJ83sq?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Updates

  - [Clicks, impressions, and click-through rates have increased from the previous week](https://fathom.video/share/nABCKSnQsoKV7BZXAebMujCT2fdJ83sq?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)
  - [New Google Analytics data added to reporting, including engagement metrics for organic search traffic](https://fathom.video/share/nABCKSnQsoKV7BZXAebMujCT2fdJ83sq?tab=summary&timestamp=909.0)
  - [Refreshed articles (24 pieces) compiled in a spreadsheet for easier tracking of performance changes](https://fathom.video/share/nABCKSnQsoKV7BZXAebMujCT2fdJ83sq?tab=summary&timestamp=990.0)
  - [New content pieces separated from refreshed content in reporting to avoid skewing metrics](https://fathom.video/share/nABCKSnQsoKV7BZXAebMujCT2fdJ83sq?tab=summary&timestamp=1045.0)

### Content Strategy Adjustments

  - [Shifting away from surface-level "what is" topics to more in-depth, strategy-focused content](https://fathom.video/share/nABCKSnQsoKV7BZXAebMujCT2fdJ83sq?tab=summary&timestamp=1287.0)
  - [Avoiding topics requiring specific step-by-step instructions with screenshots due to AI limitations](https://fathom.video/share/nABCKSnQsoKV7BZXAebMujCT2fdJ83sq?tab=summary&timestamp=1303.0)
  - [New AI writing process producing higher quality, more in-depth articles](https://fathom.video/share/nABCKSnQsoKV7BZXAebMujCT2fdJ83sq?tab=summary&timestamp=1332.0)
  - [Metadata optimization for previously published articles to improve SERP performance](https://fathom.video/share/nABCKSnQsoKV7BZXAebMujCT2fdJ83sq?tab=summary&timestamp=1162.0)

### Upcoming Content Focus

  - [Prioritizing topics related to "Facebook for B2B" due to high search volume and intent](https://fathom.video/share/nABCKSnQsoKV7BZXAebMujCT2fdJ83sq?tab=summary&timestamp=1409.0)
  - [Targeting "ABM lead gen software" keywords to compete with competitors like 6sense](https://fathom.video/share/nABCKSnQsoKV7BZXAebMujCT2fdJ83sq?tab=summary&timestamp=1436.0)
  - [Anthony shared a CSV of current Google Ads keywords to guide content ideation](https://fathom.video/share/nABCKSnQsoKV7BZXAebMujCT2fdJ83sq?tab=summary&timestamp=1402.0)

### Reporting Enhancements

  - [Added percentage increase/decrease columns for easier week-over-week comparisons](https://fathom.video/share/nABCKSnQsoKV7BZXAebMujCT2fdJ83sq?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Plans to add a total row for overall content performance metrics](https://fathom.video/share/nABCKSnQsoKV7BZXAebMujCT2fdJ83sq?tab=summary&timestamp=864.0)
  - [Google Analytics data now included, with plans for week-over-week comparisons in future reports](https://fathom.video/share/nABCKSnQsoKV7BZXAebMujCT2fdJ83sq?tab=summary&timestamp=909.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Aida to send a list of content suggestions for next week for Anthony's approval](https://fathom.video/share/nABCKSnQsoKV7BZXAebMujCT2fdJ83sq?tab=summary&timestamp=1381.0)
  - [Anthony to review and approve 9 new content pieces ready for publication](https://fathom.video/share/nABCKSnQsoKV7BZXAebMujCT2fdJ83sq?tab=summary&timestamp=1118.0)
  - [Anthony to review and approve metadata optimizations for previously published articles](https://fathom.video/share/nABCKSnQsoKV7BZXAebMujCT2fdJ83sq?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Implement new process: approve content topics before moving to production](https://fathom.video/share/nABCKSnQsoKV7BZXAebMujCT2fdJ83sq?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)
  - [Add character count columns to metadata optimization spreadsheet for easier review](https://fathom.video/share/nABCKSnQsoKV7BZXAebMujCT2fdJ83sq?tab=summary&timestamp=1193.0)
  - [Anthony's dev team to push 10 new content pieces live later today](https://fathom.video/share/nABCKSnQsoKV7BZXAebMujCT2fdJ83sq?tab=summary&timestamp=1106.0)
